# Vietopia Bistro

> Family-run Vietnamese restaurant with two locations in Salt Lake County, Utah, plus a food truck at the University of Utah.

Website: https://vietopiabistro.com
Tagline: Vietnamese, the way it's meant to be.
Cuisine: Authentic Vietnamese — pho, banh mi, bun (vermicelli), com tam (broken rice), spring rolls, stir-fried noodles, vegetarian options.

## Locations

### Taylorsville
- Address: 5308 South Redwood Road, Taylorsville, UT 84123
- Phone: 801-542-0780
- Hours: Open daily, 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Page: https://vietopiabistro.com/taylorsville.html

### West Jordan
- Address: 1407 West 9000 South, West Jordan, UT 84088
- Phone: 801-255-5364
- Hours: Open daily, 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Page: https://vietopiabistro.com/west-jordan.html

### Food Truck — University of Utah
- Location: Near the J. Willard Marriott Library, University of Utah, Salt Lake City
- Schedule: Posted on Instagram (@Vietopiabistro)
- Page: https://vietopiabistro.com/food-truck.html

## Menu
Full menu: https://vietopiabistro.com/menu.html
Same menu and pricing at both Taylorsville and West Jordan.
Categories: Appetizers, Pho, Vermicelli (Bun), Rice Plates (Com Tam), Banh Mi, Stir-Fried Noodles, Vegetarian, Drinks, Desserts.
Vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free, and spicy options are tagged on the menu.

## What we're known for
- Twelve-hour pho broth made from beef and oxtail bones, charred ginger and onion, star anise, cinnamon, clove, cardamom. No instant base.
- Banh mi on crackling baguettes with house-pickled daikon and carrot.
- Bun (vermicelli) bowls and com tam (broken rice) plates with grilled, marinated proteins.
- Separate vegan broth for vegan pho.

## Catering
Catering page: https://vietopiabistro.com/catering.html
Service area: Salt Lake County, Silicon Slopes, downtown Salt Lake City.
Group sizes: 10 to 100+.
Packages: pho bar, banh mi platters, bun bowls, family party trays.

## Ordering
Pickup orders through Toast Tab. Delivery orders through DoorDash. Both available on every page via the "Order Online" button.

## Social
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/Vietopiabistro
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/117893928228608

## Contact
General inquiries: https://vietopiabistro.com/contact.html
For the fastest response, call the location closest to you.
